name: cloudfront_distribution_in_progress_validation_batches
description: The number of invalidation batches currently in progress.

name: cloudfront_functions
description: The CloudFront Functions created

name: connection_function_etag
description: ETag of the connection function

name: connection_function_id
description: ID of the connection function

name: connection_function_status
description: Status of the connection function

name: cloudfront_distribution_id
description: The identifier for the distribution.

name: cloudfront_distribution_status
description: The current status of the distribution. Deployed if the distribution's information is fully propagated throughout the Amazon CloudFront system.

name: cloudfront_distribution_domain_name
description: The domain name corresponding to the distribution.

name: cloudfront_distribution_etag
description: The current version of the distribution's information.

name: cloudfront_vpc_origins
description: The IDS of the VPC origin created

name: cloudfront_response_headers_policies
description: The response headers policies created

name: cloudfront_distribution_caller_reference
description: Internal value used by CloudFront to allow future updates to the distribution configuration.

name: cloudfront_monitoring_subscription_id
description: The ID of the CloudFront monitoring subscription, which corresponds to the `distribution_id`.

name: connection_function_live_stage_etag
description: ETag of the function's LIVE stage. Will be empty if the function has not been published

name: cloudfront_distribution_last_modified_time
description: The date and time the distribution was last modified.

name: cloudfront_distribution_hosted_zone_id
description: The CloudFront Route 53 zone ID that can be used to route an Alias Resource Record Set to.

name: cloudfront_origin_access_controls
description: The origin access controls created

name: connection_function_arn
description: ARN of the connection function

name: cloudfront_distribution_arn
description: The ARN (Amazon Resource Name) for the distribution.

name: cloudfront_distribution_trusted_signers
description: List of nested attributes for active trusted signers, if the distribution is set up to serve private content with signed URLs
